title: Make the "An automation is running" notice visible when an item view is open

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
When an automation kicks off, the “An automation is running” notice will be hidden behind any open item view.

It would be cool if the notice appeared over the top of any views.

image684×218 5.19 KB

This is a small UX improvement that could be achieve easily by the monday UX team with a small sprinkling of CSS - fixing the z-index.
